differential_diagnoses: Coronary embolic phenomenon from apical thrombus
next_steps: Genetic counseling and testing for cardiomyopathy-associated mutations
Holter monitoring for surveillance of sustained ventricular arrhythmias
Implantation of implantable cardioverter-defibrillator (ICD) for primary prevention
Continued adherence to guideline-directed medical therapy
Serologic testing for Trypanosoma cruzi IgG
Implantation of implantable cardioverter-defibrillator (ICD) for primary prevention of sudden cardiac death
Evaluation for gastrointestinal involvement of Chagas disease (e.g., barium swallow or abdominal imaging)
Continued optimization and adherence to guideline-directed medical therapy
Serial Holter monitoring for arrhythmia surveillance
